items.author: morimensbestgame

items.title: F2P Friendly and Legit Gameplay
items.summary:
I don’t write reviews often but really wanted to give this game the kudos it deserves after finishing Arc 1.

There’s a real game beneath the gacha elements and those are extremely generous. The story takes a bit to get going but once it does I was hooked.

There’s plenty of little interactions and stories with the Awakeners that make them feel more engaging than just “pull of the month”

This is one game worth your time.
items.author: Saland

items.title: 可不可以把融灾的自动设置回来
items.summary: 对于学业繁忙但又喜欢忘却的画风 并花了几百块进去的玩家来说，融灾的自动很重要。实在不想花时间去学多个队伍怎么去打融灾，希望可以把融灾带回来qwqqq 我还想继续支持这个游戏，不然很劝退我这种玩家
items.author: Senxxxx?

items.title: Peak.
items.summary: Played this game for a month. It's generous, has fun gameplay, and a great gacha system. My only criticism is losing 2 times in a row is guarantee, but i get it, as hard pity is only 30. As someone who's been playing other gacha games, this by far is probably the best in my opinion.
items.author: RinOnDrugs
